hooks.prompt: Determine if renpy-dev:collect-lessons needs to run before stopping. Check: (1) Does the project have a `.renpy-dev/` directory? If NO, return 'approve'. (2) Review the conversation — was `renpy-dev:collect-lessons` already invoked and completed in this session? If YES, return 'approve'. (3) If `.renpy-dev/` exists and collect-lessons has NOT run yet this session, return 'block' with reason: 'Run renpy-dev:collect-lessons to record Ren'Py development experience from this session before stopping.'
